PATIENT_ID: TEST_DELIRIUM_CAM_ICU_001
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-01-15 08:00:00

[NURSING_NOTE] 2026-01-17 06:00:00
Shift assessment performed on geriatric trauma patient.
Overall CAM-ICU: positive
Patient restless, pulling at lines, not following commands.
Feature 1: Acute Onset or Fluctuating Course: Yes
Feature 2: Inattention: Yes
bCAM screening: positive
Notified physician of positive delirium screen.
